subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of the horizons! Thanks be unto Thee, that the eye hath been illumined by beholding Thy countenance, and heart and soul are transported by the sweet fragrances of Thy sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دلبر آفاق شکر ترا که دیده بدیدارت روشن گردید و دل و جان از نفحات قدست غبطه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @The Holy Spirit, @prayer for protection
